---
title: "Week 14"
date: 05-04-26
description: We will discuss essential concepts to hypothesis testing.
editor: source
draft: false
---


## Resources

| Lecture   | Slides                       | Annotated  | Video     |
|-----------|------------------------------|------------|-----------|
| Tuesday    | [Slides](../lectures/14a.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/14a_annotated.pdf) | [Video](https://youtu.be/_bMD01N-uMM) |
| Thursday | [Slides](../lectures/13b.pdf) | [Slides](../lectures/13b_annotated.pdf) | [Video]() |
